summary: Staff Kundennummer (Staff Number) feature fully tested. All backend APIs (10/10 tests) and frontend UI features verified successfully. Staff can now login with auto-generated Kundennummer instead of email.

elements_found: Staff creation form with Name, Password, Role fields
Info text: 'Eine eindeutige Kundennummer wird automatisch für die Anmeldung generiert'
Info text: 'Mitarbeiter kann sich mit der Kundennummer und dem Passwort oben anmelden'
Staff items with Kundennummer displayed (WI-008-001, WI-008-002, etc.)
Hash icon (#) instead of Mail icon
Helper text: 'Geben Sie die Kundennummer ein, die Sie von Ihrem Arbeitgeber erhalten haben'
Info text: 'Theken-Mitarbeiter Login - Eingeschränkter Zugang nur für Scanner und Zahlungsfunktionen'

staff_login_success.result: Logged in as 'Test Mitarbeiter' with Scanner/Pay view (counter role)

features_verified.staff_login_form_shows_kundennummer_fiel: PASS - Label, Hash icon, text input, helper text
features_verified.staff_list_shows_kundennummer: PASS - Each staff shows their Kundennummer
features_verified.copy_button_for_kundennummer: PASS - Works in modal and list

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/partner-portal/staff/login accepts staff_number instead of email
Frontend: Login form shows 'Kundennummer' field with Hash icon for staff login
Frontend: Staff creation modal displays generated Kundennummer with copy button
Frontend: Staff list shows Kundennummer for each staff member
seed_data_creation: Created test staff 'Test Mitarbeiter UI' with Kundennummer WI-008-003 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Kundennummer feature fully implemented. Staff members can now login using auto-generated Kundennummer (format: XX-XXX-XXX) instead of email. Test staff WI-008-001 with password 'staff123' available for testing. Partner 'wise-test@partner.com' has multiple staff members with Kundennummern WI-008-001, WI-008-002, WI-008-003.
